files.name: manifest
files.source:
<script type="application/json">
{
  "name": "LEMATANG",
  "short_name": "LEMATANG",
  "start_url": "/",
  "display": "standalone",
  "background_color": "#F1F8E9",
  "theme_color": "#0a90cd",
  "orientation": "portrait",
  "icons": [
    {
      "src": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mohdreynaldi-afk/lematang-assets/main/logo-lematang1.png",
      "sizes": "192x192",
      "type": "image/png"
    },
    {
      "src": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mohdreynaldi-afk/lematang-assets/main/logo-lematang1.png",
      "sizes": "512x512",
      "type": "image/png"
    }
  ]
}
</script>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
  <head>
  <link rel="manifest" href="manifest.json">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#0a90cd">
    <base target="_top">
  </head>
  <body>
    
  </body>
</html>
